'''Pallie wine''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage sold in [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. [[Naduarr]]'s [[Wine/Legends|wine]] was considered by [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] to be one of the best in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]].<ref name="TG" />

{{Food-stub}}
